title: Snappy Lazy-Sunday Yogurt Skewers Mediterranean
description: A delicious and easy Mediterranean-inspired snack featuring yogurt, mushrooms, and seafood. Perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon.
instructions: Thread 1-2 tablespoons of olive oil onto bamboo skewers, leaving space between for easy handling.
Add 1/2 cup of sliced cherry tomatoes, 1/2 cup of sliced mushrooms, and 1/4 cup of chopped fresh parsley to the skewers.
Top with 1-2 tablespoons of crumbled feta cheese and 1/4 cup of sliced olives.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
